pet.drawerAppearancePlaceholder: e.g. medium-build black short-haired British Shorthair, white tuft on tail tip
pet.autoGenHint: Upload a clear photo or a short video of the pet to auto-generate an appearance description
pet.poseGuide: Provide photos or a video covering different viewpoints (front, side, back)
pet.speciesTip: Mainly supports cats and dogs; other species are experimental and may perform worse
pet.countHint: We suggest no more than 3 pets (you can still add more)
pet.noPetDetected: No pet detected in the media, try a clearer one
pet.multiPetHint: Multiple pets detected; described the most prominent one
pet.modelUnconfigured: No perception model configured — set one in Model config first
pet.cropHint: Drag to move · scroll or slider to zoom
pet.confirmDeletePet: Delete {{name}}? The pet's profile info will be removed and cannot be recovered.
pet.saveFail: Couldn't save, please try again later
pet.deleteFail: Couldn't delete, please try again later
pet.experimentalHint: When on, pets can be registered as family members and named in scene descriptions; turning off only hides them, it does not delete recorded pets.
pet.profilePetEmptyHint: Upload a photo to auto-generate, or tap Edit to add
